allow: Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); k = os.getenv\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'', ''''\); print\(f''Key loaded: {bool\(k and k != ""your-api-key-here""\)}''\); print\(f''Length: {len\(k\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); k = os.getenv\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'', ''''\); print\(f''Key loaded: {len\(k\) > 10}''\); print\(f''Length: {len\(k\)}''\); print\(f''Starts with: {k[:10]}''\)")

Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; p = Path\(''E:/learningAgent/graph.py''\).parent / ''.env''; print\(p\); print\(p.exists\(\)\); from dotenv import load_dotenv; r = load_dotenv\(p\); print\(f''loaded: {r}''\); import os; print\(f''key: {repr\(os.getenv\(""ANTHROPIC_API_KEY""\)\)[:20]}''\)")
